title: pristiglottis longiflora
intro: Pristiglottis longiflora, also known as the Long-flowered Pristiglottis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Pristiglottis longiflora include treating various ailments such as fever, coughs, and skin infections, as well as promoting wound healing and reducing inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures that can be consumed orally or applied topically for therapeutic purposes.
